---
# Browser-history exhibit-only render. Attachment cover sheet plus a
# tabular browser-activity extract showing search queries and visits
# in chronological order.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-browser.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: Westbridge
county: Hartwell County
city: Northfield
detective-name: Detective J. Hayes

case-number: CR24-087

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is an extract of recent search-engine queries and visited
  URLs recovered from the suspect's primary browsing device on
  04-22-24, ordered chronologically.

# `browser-history` and `search-history` are accepted as aliases.
exhibit-type: browser-history
exhibit-title: BROWSER ACTIVITY EXTRACT
exhibit-device: "Samsung Galaxy A10e — Serial #RF8N41QDFOE"

# Each record carries:
#   timestamp — date + time of the activity
#   type      — search | visit | download
#   query     — for searches: the query terms (use this OR url)
#   url       — for visits / downloads: the URL
#   title     — page title (for visits) or source description
#   source    — browser name (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, etc.)
#
# Searches are tinted blue; visits and downloads are gray.
exhibit-records:
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-18 09:14", type: search, query: "what to expect at 23 weeks pregnant",     source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-18 09:18", type: visit,  url: "https://www.example-clinic.org/late-term", title: "Late-term care information",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-19 22:03", type: search, query: "how to induce labor at home safely",     source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-19 22:05", type: search, query: "[redacted] medication purchase online",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-19 22:11", type: visit,  url: "https://meds-online.example/checkout",     title: "Checkout — order confirmation",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-19 22:15", type: search, query: "how long does [redacted] take to work",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-20 13:42", type: search, query: "side effects of taking [redacted]",      source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-20 13:47", type: visit,  url: "https://forum.example/thread/19842",       title: "Patient forum — symptom thread",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-20 16:30", type: search, query: "how to dispose of [redacted] evidence",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
  - {timestamp: "2024-04-22 03:12", type: search, query: "buried remains decomposition timeline",  source: "Chrome (Mobile)"}
---
